channel.title: Tax & Legal Guide
channel.description: US taxes, LLC formation, and business law made simple

item.title: How to Start an LLC in 2026: The Complete Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Everything you need to form an LLC — from choosing your state to filing and compliance.

item.title: US Tax Filing Guide for Freelancers & Independent Contractors 2026
item.description: Complete freelancer tax guide — quarterly payments, Schedule C, deductions, and more.
